title: Julia Chin
compiled_truth: Julia Chin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-08 to 2001-06-05), Julia Chin sent 11 and received 72 emails, totalling 83 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (10), [Rex Rogers](people/rex-rogers) (1), [Jim Armogida](people/jim-armogida) (1), [Angela Davis](people/angela-davis) (1), [Mary Cook](people/mary-cook) (1).
timeline:
